---
title: "Projects"
---

1. **Clinical Visualization Gallery — Colon Cancer Data**

Built in **R** using `ggplot2` and `survminer`, this project visualizes survival and prognostic patterns in colon cancer data.  
It highlights treatment outcomes, disease extent, and lymph node involvement through clear, reproducible graphics.

**Tools:** R, ggplot2, survminer, tidyverse  
**Domain:** Oncology | Survival Analysis | Clinical Data Visualization  

- [View Code on GitHub](https://github.com/Olofin98/clinical-viz-tools)  
- [Read Full Report on Website](https://github.com/Olofin98/clinical-viz-tools/blob/main/Clinical_Viz.pdf)
